line_1: "The thing is plain from Cocus's reports,
line_2: "For rules of poetry an't rules of courts:

line_1: “For,” said she “our sly Mercury ofttimes reports
line_2: That your sons are divided”  — Columbia retorts,

line_1: Can he that ne'er read statutes or reports,
line_2: Give chamber counsel, or urge law in courts?

line_1: So I from Coke's and Croke's reports,
line_2: And special pleadings of the courts,
